sections.location: Electric water heater located in kitchen closet.
Circuit breaker located behind door of front bedroom downstairs.
Water meter is located near the road in front of the house. Look for two small blue lines on the curb indicating the water meter location.
HVAC filter size is 12x12. Change filters quarterly: August, November, February, and May.
Fire extinguisher is located under the kitchen sink.

tips.text: Do not wash large loads — this can cause the machine to be off balance. Clean the lint tray after EVERY use (fire hazard). Do not wash towels with clothes to prevent odors.

Run the bathroom vent fan for at least 15 minutes after showering. Leave bathroom doors open to air out. Clean bathrooms regularly, spray shower after each use, and close shower curtains to allow them to dry. Remove hair from drain daily to prevent clogs.

Summer: Set thermostat no lower than 72°F (78°F optimal). Run ceiling fans and do NOT turn off the unit — turn the temp up instead. Winter: Set thermostat no higher than 68°F. Do NOT turn off units day or night — running heat prevents pipes from freezing. Change filters regularly.

Your HVAC system helps control humidity — keep it running and submit a work order if it's not working properly. If an area feels clammy or sticky, a room-sized dehumidifier can help remove excess moisture and prevent mold growth and allergens.
